name: Linear
description_en: Manage Linear issues, projects, and teams from your agent—create issues, update status, query projects, and drive team workflows.
description_zh: 在智能体中管理 Linear 的 issue、项目与团队——创建 issue、更新状态、查询项目并推进团队工作流。
long_en: A mature skill (v3.2.0) that works across multiple Linear backends—MCP, GraphQL, and WebFetch—to read and mutate issues, projects, and team workflows.
long_zh: 一个成熟技能(v3.2.0),兼容多种 Linear 后端(MCP、GraphQL、WebFetch),读写 issue、项目与团队工作流。
sec_note_en: Needs a Linear API token and can modify your workspace data; scope the token and review writes.
sec_note_zh: 需要 Linear API 令牌,且会修改工作区数据;请限定令牌权限并审阅写操作。
